CholCheck.description: 0 = no cholesterol check in 5 years 1 = yes cholesterol check in 5 years

Smoker.description: Have you smoked at least 100 cigarettes in your entire life? [Note: 5 packs = 100 cigarettes] 0 = no 1 = yes

Stroke.description: (Ever told) you had a stroke. 0 = no 1 = yes

HeartDiseaseorAttack.description: coronary heart disease (CHD) or myocardial infarction (MI) 0 = no 1 = yes

PhysActivity.description: physical activity in past 30 days - not including job 0 = no 1 = yes

Fruits.description: Consume Fruit 1 or more times per day 0 = no 1 = yes

Veggies.description: Consume Vegetables 1 or more times per day 0 = no 1 = yes

HvyAlcoholConsump.description: Heavy drinkers (adult men having more than 14 drinks per week and adult women having more than 7 drinks per week

AnyHealthcare.description: Have any kind of health care coverage, including health insurance, prepaid plans such as HMO, etc. 0 = no 1 = yes

NoDocbcCost.description: Was there a time in the past 12 months when you needed to see a doctor but could not because of cost? 0 = no 1 = yes

GenHlth.description: Would you say that in general your health is: scale 1-5 1 = excellent 2 = very good 3 = good 4 = fair 5 = poor

MentHlth.description: Now thinking about your mental health, which includes stress, depression, and problems with emotions, for how many days during the past 30 days was your mental health not good? scale 1-30 days

PhysHlth.description: Now thinking about your physical health, which includes physical illness and injury, for how many days during the past 30 days was your physical health not good? scale 1-30 days

DiffWalk.description: Do you have serious difficulty walking or climbing stairs? 0 = no 1 = yes

Age.description: 13-level age category (_AGEG5YR see codebook) 1 = 18-24 9 = 60-64 13 = 80 or older

Education.description: Education level (EDUCA see codebook) scale 1-6 1 = Never attended school or only kindergarten 2 = Grades 1 through 8 (Elementary) 3 = Grades 9 through 11 (Some high school) 4 = Grade 12 or GED (High school graduate) 5 = College 1 year to 3 years (Some college or technical school) 6 = College 4 years or more (College graduate)

Income.description: Income scale (INCOME2 see codebook) scale 1-8 1 = less than $10,000 5 = less than $35,000 8 = $75,000 or more
